input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.3.1
            TITLE: the charging shutdown circuit consists of:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.3.1: The Charging Shutdown Circuit consists of:
EV.8.3.1 The Charging Shutdown Circuit consists of: 
a. Charger Shutdown Button  EV.8.2.7 
b. Accumulator Management System (AMS)  EV.7.3 
c. Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD)  EV.7.6

final_answer: The Charging Shutdown Circuit consists of: a. Charger Shutdown Button EV.8.2.7 b. Accumulator Management System (AMS) EV.7.3 c. Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD) EV.7.6
